relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Spatial protocols/HE staining paraffin sections.docx
full_text:
Hematoxylin and Eosin staining on paraffin sections:

Paraffin removal and rehydration

Place the slides in a grey plastic slide holder

Immerse the slides in xylene and alcohol solutions in the following order

Xylene 3x 5min

100% alcohol 3x 1min

96% alcohol 2x 1min

70% alcohol 1min

MQ water 1x 1min

Staining

incubate the sections 10 minutes in filtered Hematoxylin

rinse in running tap water for 5 minutes

dip 2x in ‘Diffi’ solution (70% EtOH+ 1% HCl)

rinse in running tap water for 5 minutes

incubate in filtered Eosin for 1 min

dehydrate the slides by immersing them in alcohol and xylene solutions as follows

96% alcohol 2x 10 sec, 100% alcohol 3x 30 sec, xylene 3x 1min

embed the slides in Eukitt mounting medium.

Reagents

Hematoxylin solution modified acc. to Gill II Cat no. 1051752500 Sigma/Merk

Eosin Y-solution 0.5% aqueous Cat no. 1098442500 Sigma/Merk
